about.illustrationAlt: Heart character waving in the EZPZ illustration style
about.illustrationCaption: Illustration pulled from the EZPZ arts library.
about.intro: EZPZ is a project created by entrepreneurs who have been working in the coffee industry for many years. This platform was designed to simplify production, no matter what your needs are.

paragraphs: Our solution is made for anyone who wants to easily create and produce their own coffee bags.

Whether it's to offer a unique gift to someone or to launch large-scale production, our platform streamlines every step of the process. We can produce a single bag or hundreds of them, at a low cost, to suit your reality and your needs.

about.title: About EZPZ

coffee.illustrationAlt: Coffee cup mascot flashing a peace sign
coffee.illustrationCaption: Our coffee mascot, pulled from the EZPZ arts pack.
coffee.intro: At EZPZ, we source our beans from passionate producers who cultivate exceptional coffee with rich, balanced aromas.

paragraphs: Our roasting, carried out in Montréal at Canadian Roasting Company, highlights the full complexity of each origin.

Every bag is roasted with precision to guarantee an optimal experience — a cup worthy of the finest baristas, sure to delight your clients, your employees, or anyone who has the pleasure of enjoying your coffee.

coffee.title: An exceptional coffee, from bean to cup.

surfaceDescriptions.bottom: Bottom strip treatment works best for high-detail imagery or signatures.
surfaceDescriptions.full: Edge-to-edge coverage—best for bold photography or seamless patterns.
surfaceDescriptions.sandwich: Sandwiched bands keep typography crisp and separated from the artwork.

home.uploadHelper: Upload one JPG or PNG (max 10MB). Drag to crop in the preview.

about.description: EZPZ Coffee exists to spotlight the farmers and producers behind every bag. Learn how we keep sourcing transparent and give customers a direct line to origin stories.
about.ogDescription: We are the transmission belt between microlot producers and the people who drink their coffee. Get to know the team and the promises that guide our work.
about.title: About EZPZ Coffee | Producer-first custom roastery
about.twitterDescription: Transparency, traceability, and respect for the producers behind every custom bag. Learn what drives us.

coffee.description: See how EZPZ curates microlots, profiles each roast, and recommends brew parameters so your custom bags stay true to origin.
coffee.ogDescription: From selective harvest calendars to deliberately gentle roast curves, here is every lever we pull to keep flavor honest.
coffee.title: Our Coffee | Sourcing, roasting, and brewing the EZPZ way
coffee.twitterDescription: Producer partnerships, roast profiles, and brew specs—all in one place.

home.description: Upload artwork, pick roast and grind options, and preview your 225g EZPZ coffee bags before adding them to the cart.
home.ogDescription: Personalize the label, grind, and roast profile—preview it live before you checkout.
home.ogTitle: Design a custom EZPZ coffee bag
home.title: Customize your EZPZ coffee bags
home.twitterDescription: Personalize every detail and see the preview instantly.
